name: create-wiki-llm
description: Scaffold a Karpathy-style LLM knowledge-base repo for Claude Code, driven by kb-* skills.

scripts.test: node --test test/customization-check.test.mjs test/manifest.test.mjs test/path-safety.test.mjs test/safety.test.mjs test/scaffold-snapshot.test.mjs test/template.test.mjs test/update-integration.test.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check-manifest && npm test && node scripts/version-check.mjs
